headline: Essex (ESS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Barb Pak will follow with prepared remarks, and Roland Burns is here for Q&A. Today, I will cover highlights of our fourth quarter and full year performance for 2025, provide our outlook for 2026 and conclude with an update on the transaction market.  '25 played out generally in line with our initial macro forecast for the U.S. with job growth moderating throughout the year.
